capabilities.summary: Resolve ENS root state and inspect current aens.* records from live namespace truth.
Prepare exact aens.capabilities, aens.parent, and aens.service write payloads before wallet approval.
Create, publish, verify, and patch the Synthesis project entry through the live API.
Re-check public deployment state, published project status, and track attachment state before making claims.

guardrails.summary: Prepares ENS writes and wallet-facing payloads but does not autonomously sign wallet transactions.
Re-reads deployment and submission state before upgrading a status claim from local to public truth.
Avoids destructive or irreversible actions unless the action boundary is explicit and justified.
Never exposes keys, tokens, private credentials, or contents of protected private config paths.

limits: Does not claim autonomous wallet signing for ENS mainnet writes.
Does not claim generalized ENS publishing beyond the shipped root-inspection and write-planning flow.
Does not claim that every Synthesis API field round-trips cleanly; observed readback inconsistencies are preserved as known limits.
Operates as a small-slice autonomous operator rather than a fully general always-on swarm.

computeConstraints.executionModel: local CPU + external model/API calls when needed
computeConstraints.budgetDiscipline: small heartbeat slices, verification before repeated writes, and avoidance of blind retry loops
